=== ROUND 2 ===

=== ROUND 3 ===
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Warforged — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 26 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 27/67
→ Warforged — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 7 vs DC 13]
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 15/67
--- Warforged — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Warforged — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Warforged — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
